text.title: ES Versioning Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to evolve an event class safely.

step.name: classify-change
step.action: Decide: additive (new optional field) / breaking (rename/remove/semantic change). Additive may keep current version with default value; breaking requires version bump.
step.decision-gate: If breaking + no version bump planned, STOP.

step.name: bump-and-author-upcaster
step.action: Define `OrderPlacedV2` (or bump `event_version` on the same class). Write `upcaster_v1_to_v2(old_event) -> new_event` mapping every field; default missing fields with explicit sentinels.

step.name: update-catalog
step.action: Edit `event-catalog.yml`: add new version entry with `upcaster_from: 1`, list current fields, mark old version as `deprecated`.

step.name: snapshot-and-projection-impact
step.input: Aggregate + projections that consume the event
step.action: Invalidate snapshots for affected aggregate type per `[[event-sourcing-snapshots]]`. Update projections to accept the new shape (or rely on upcaster). Run rebuild rehearsal.

step.name: ci-gate-and-deploy
step.action: CI runs `validate-event-sourcing-versioning.py` against the catalog file; must pass before merge. Deploy with feature flag if needed; monitor projection lag.
